ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the game (e.g., D-II) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "stat_category" TEXT /* Category of statistics (e.g., RUSHING, PASSING) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* The location where the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* The final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach in charge of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* The year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* The name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* The position the player plays (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently on */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* The player's jersey number */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* The player's date of birth */,
  "height" TEXT /* The player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* The player's weight */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* The team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The draft round */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The draft pick number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., ATT, YDS, TD) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "time" TEXT /* The time in the game when the statistic was recorded */,
  "half" TEXT /* The half of the game */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* The quarter of the game */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_statistic FOREIGN KEY ("statistic") REFERENCES stat_categories ("stat_category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stat_categories" (
  "stat_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic category */,
  "stat_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions assigned to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
